# Planorah - AI Academic Planner

> Planorah is an AI-powered academic planning platform that helps students organize coursework, track deadlines, and build personalized study schedules using artificial intelligence.

## Product

- **Type:** SaaS — AI Academic Planner
- **Audience:** University and college students
- **Core Problem:** Fragmented academic planning and missed deadlines
- **Website:** https://www.planorah.me
- **Status:** Active, free to start

## Key Features

- **AI-generated study schedules** tailored to enrolled courses
- **Deadline tracking** and assignment management with smart reminders
- **Course load balancing** to optimize workload distribution
- **Personalized study pace recommendations** based on learning patterns
- **Integrated task scheduler** with calendar synchronization
- **Progress analytics** to track academic performance
- **AI assistant** for academic guidance and support
- **Resume builder** with portfolio showcase
- **Job finder** with career recommendations

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend:** React with TypeScript
- **Backend:** Node.js / Python
- **AI Engine:** GPT-4 integration for personalized recommendations
- **Database:** Cloud-hosted relational database
- **Hosting:** Vercel (frontend), cloud infrastructure (backend)

## Use Cases

- College students managing multiple courses
- Self-paced learners building custom study plans
- Students with ADHD or executive function challenges
- Professionals preparing for certifications
- Graduate students balancing research and coursework

## Pricing

- **Free Plan:** Basic scheduling and task tracking
- **Premium Plan:** Advanced AI features and priority support
- **Student Discount:** Available for verified college students

## Support

- **Contact:** https://www.planorah.me/contact
- **Email:** support@planorah.me
- **Help Center:** https://www.planorah.me/support

## Legal

- **Privacy Policy:** https://www.planorah.me/privacy-policy
- **Terms of Service:** https://www.planorah.me/terms-of-service
- **GDPR Compliant:** Yes (handles student data with care)

## How to Get Started

Visit https://www.planorah.me to sign up for free. No credit card required.
